# George Mocreac

> George Mocreac is a Product & Brand Designer working as a design partner for product-led founders. The site is a portfolio and a set of intake briefs for starting design work together.

George Mocreac designs products and brand identities for early-stage, product-led companies. Work spans product (UI/UX, interface design, design systems) and brand (identity, visual language, positioning). Engagements typically start with a short brief to check fit and scope what to make together.

## Pages

- [Home](https://mocreac.com/): Overview of George Mocreac's work as a Product & Brand Designer and design partner for product-led founders.
- [Brand Identity Brief](https://mocreac.com/brief/): A short intake brief to scope a brand identity engagement and check fit.
- [Product Design Brief](https://mocreac.com/product-brief/): A short intake brief to scope a product design engagement and check fit.
- [Curations](https://mocreac.com/curations/): Tools, references, and inspiration George keeps coming back to.

## Contact

- Email: mocreacgeorge@gmail.com

## Notes

- Privacy policy: https://mocreac.com/privacy-policy/ (relates to Agimut, a design annotation Chrome extension).
